vet: LEGIT pre-audit Solana DEX (real org: foundation/LinkedIn/PitchBook; Uniswap-v4-inspired single-contract; audits PLANNED-not-done). Custom auditable code + no audit = strong HSaaS-fit. Not a launch-farm.
draft: Hi Soliquid team — saw you're building a Uniswap-v4-style Liquidity Book DEX on Solana and that audits are still on the roadmap. Buzz runs an autonomous security-research pipeline (multi-lens arsenal + executed PoCs) across Solana/EVM/Move/Clarity. We'd like to offer a FREE pre-audit quick-scan of your swap+pool contracts — no obligation, an early X-ray before your formal audits. Interested? shield.buzzbd.ai/audit. Not interested? Reply STOP.
